mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT( create_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) day, count( 1 ) count FROM cat_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time > #{lastDate} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day;

SELECT CONCAT( cap.group_name,'-',cap.name) name,COUNT(1) count FROM cat_api_path cap INNER JOIN cat_web_log cwl on cap.path = cwl.req_path group by cap.group_name,cap.name ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC LIMIT 10
